name: simulador-consulta
description: Browser-local SQL practice simulator for ASIR students

scripts.pretest: node tools/check-focused-tests.js && node tools/build-seed-js.js --check && node tools/validate-exercises.js
scripts.test: node --test tools/convert-pokemon-sql.test.js tools/build-seed-js.test.js tests/result-compare.test.js tests/sql-engine.test.js tests/app-flow.test.js tests/persistence.test.js tests/app-bootstrap.test.js tests/embedded-seed.test.js tests/schema-reference.test.js tests/schema-modal.test.js tests/previous-navigation.test.js tests/textarea-input.test.js tests/side-menu-and-skip.test.js tests/focused-test-guard.test.js tools/review-exports.test.js
